text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Phase 2-4: iOS model/subscription, AdMob SDK, ad placement + reward flow","description":"Modify all iOS files for the ad-based BM transition:

Phase 2 - iOS model/subscription changes:
2-1. AuthUser.swift: SubscriptionTier → free/pro only, remove dailyLimit, add isPro
2-2. APIModels.swift: Update QuotaResponse (remove tier, add bonus fields), add RewardClaimResponse
2-3. StoreManager.swift: productIDs → pro.monthly only, update verifyTransaction for isPro
2-4. SubscriptionView.swift: Free/Pro UI, remove dailyLimit text
2-5. QuotaView.swift: Remove tier display, add bonus section + reward button + Pro upsell
2-6. SettingsView.swift: Subscription label isPro ? "Pro" : "Free"

Phase 3 - AdMob SDK integration:
3-1. project.yml: Add GoogleMobileAds SPM package
3-2. Info.plist: Add GADApplicationIdentifier, NSUserTrackingUsageDescription, SKAdNetworkItems
3-3. NEW Services/Ads/AdManager.swift: @Observable singleton, initialize/load/show reward ad, claimRewardOnBackend
3-4. NEW Views/Ads/BannerAdView.swift: UIViewRepresentable for BannerView
3-5. ExercisePlanApp.swift: Import GoogleMobileAds, ATT, initialize AdManager
3-6. Constants.swift: Add Ads enum constants

Phase 4 - Ad placement + reward flow:
4-1. ChatViewModel.swift: showQuotaExceeded, canWatchRewardAd, watchRewardAd()
4-2. PlanGeneratorViewModel.swift: Same quota exceeded + reward pattern
4-3. ChatView.swift: Banner between divider and input (non-Pro), quota exceeded alert
4-4. PlanGeneratorView.swift: Banner below planList (non-Pro), quota exceeded alert","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-02-23T10:57:05.104Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"Phase 2: iOS Model/Subscription Changes","description":"Update AuthUser.swift, APIModels.swift, StoreManager.swift, SubscriptionView.swift, QuotaView.swift, SettingsView.swift for ad-based BM migration","assignedBy":"ios-dev","timestamp":"2026-02-23T10:57:12.854Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"6","subject":"Phase 3: AdMob SDK Integration","description":"Update project.yml, Info.plist, create AdManager.swift, BannerAdView.swift, update ExercisePlanApp.swift and Constants.swift","assignedBy":"ios-dev","timestamp":"2026-02-23T10:58:51.556Z"}

{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"7","subject":"Phase 4: Ad Placement + Reward Flow","description":"Update ChatViewModel, PlanGeneratorViewModel, ChatView, PlanGeneratorView for ad placement and reward ad flow","assignedBy":"ios-dev","timestamp":"2026-02-23T10:59:38.083Z"}
